costco.name: Costco
costco.notes: Lower-tech than Walmart; depot cross-dock model

short_ship.notes: Windows not published; inferred industry norm

early_delivery.notes: Cross-dock timing strict; early = storage fee

warehouse_spoils.notes: Short shelf-life at depot; cross-dock model

edi_requirements.requirement: Scheduled appointment window; 30-minute grace then refusal
50 lb max if hand-lifted; 1500 lbs crush <750lb load, 2500 lbs >=750lb load
GS1-128/SSCC, on two adjacent sides; vendor#, PO, item, qty, weight, destination
48x40 footprint; 58 inch max height; iGPS/PECO/CHEP only — no GMA #1 stringer

green_basket_market.name: Green Basket Market
green_basket_market.notes: Sprouts-archetype: natural/reset-driven; many deductions arrive via UNFI/KeHE statements

short_ship.notes: Many deductions arrive via UNFI/KeHE statements

promo_billback.notes: Free Fill + Fair Share via reset calendar

edi_requirements.requirement: Refresh / category-reset calendar drives placement timing
edi_requirements.penalty_if_violated: Free Fill / Fair Share billbacks per reset

harbor_fresh.name: Harbor Fresh
harbor_fresh.notes: Generic regional; slightly higher recovery — relationship-driven

damaged.notes: K-Solve; UDR for damage at receipt

vague.notes: Connect BI fee 2% of sales falls here

edi_requirements.requirement: On-time delivery; UDR triggers on shortage/over/damage at receipt

southside_grocers.name: Southside Grocers
southside_grocers.notes: Wegmans-archetype: specialty/local-supplier friendly, buyer-relationship dispute path

edi_requirements.requirement: EDI 850/855/810/997; ASN entry via supplier portal
GS1-128 case labels with lot/catch weight/expiration; SSCC pallet labels two per pallet

unfi.name: UNFI
unfi.notes: Natural side: Deductions@unfi.com — .xlsb only, PDFs/screenshots rejected

short_ship.notes: 30-60 day practical window; Excel-only dispute form

promo_billback.notes: MCB disputes common; unsubstantiated promo backups

early_delivery.notes: Early arrival at DC; inferred norms

warehouse_spoils.notes: Product expires in UNFI DC; shelf-life agreements

store_spoils.notes: Unsaleables on natural side; velocity mismatch

edi_requirements.requirement: Natural side: 1 day notice; Conventional: 3 days
95% fill-rate; service-level fine if missed two consecutive weeks

walmart.name: Walmart
walmart.notes: Multiple systems by deduction type — APDP for AP shortages/allowances, HighRadius for AR/OTIF

label_fine.notes: SQEP fines; window not separately published

damaged.notes: Code 28; same APDP window as shortage

late_delivery.notes: OTIF; 3% of COGS; HighRadius dispute window not verified

freight_routing.notes: Routing guide noncompliance; collect vs prepaid confusion

warehouse_spoils.notes: Product expires in DC; shelf-life agreement enforcement

store_spoils.notes: Product expires at store; velocity mismatch

pricing_invoice.notes: Cost file mismatch; item setup error

duplicate_deduction.notes: Same deduction taken twice — easy win with proof

wrong_brand.notes: Retailer-side error; deduction meant for another supplier

placement_fees.notes: Slotting/placement fees — largely non-disputable but occasionally forecasting error

codes.name: Carton Shortage / Freight Bill Signed Short
Carton Damage – Freight Bill Signed Damaged

edi_requirements.requirement: EDI 856 ASN required before shipment arrives

edi_requirements.penalty_if_violated: Code 22 perceived shortage if not scannable

edi_requirements.requirement: GS1-128 case labels with Walmart-required fields, two per case
Walmart pallet spec, slip-sheet/wrap, height limits

whole_foods.name: Whole Foods
whole_foods.notes: Pay-by-PO program gates dispute access; regional fragmentation

promo_billback.notes: Regional fragmentation — different practices per region

freight_routing.notes: Regional; some DCs enforce routing guides

placement_fees.notes: New-item slotting + reset fees by region; non-disputable

edi_requirements.requirement: Category-specific (Center Store, Perishable, Adult Beverage, Culinary)
